attr.title: HillSequencer
attr.desc: An 8-track x 16-step grid sequencer that plays HillChord's pitched sample instruments. Per-track instrument, tuned note, velocity, mute/volume and baked effects (reverb/delay/chorus/bitcrush), with patterns, chaining, swing, tap tempo, sequence save/load and a backing-loop player.
attr.inst: Shares HillChord's sample library (ROMs/Samples on the SD card). On first launch HillSequencer installs its Python deps (needs network once).
